name: Razorpay Partner API — OAuth2 Client Credentials
scenario: Razorpay needs HDFC Bank to call its payment API programmatically (no user). Configure OAuth2 Client Credentials resource server and a WebClient that auto-manages tokens for outbound HDFC API calls.

core.description: SecurityFilterChain: STATELESS, JWT resource server, scope-based: GET /api/payments → SCOPE_payments:read, POST /api/payments → SCOPE_payments:write.
application.yml: OAuth2 client registration 'hdfc-api' with client_credentials grant, scopes, token-uri from env vars.
HdfcWebClientConfig: WebClient bean using OAuth2AuthorizedClientManager with ServerOAuth2AuthorizedClientExchangeFilterFunction.
TokenInspectorService: hasScope(Jwt, String) and getClientId(Jwt) methods.
@WebMvcTest (3 tests): read scope → 200, write scope → 200, read scope on POST → 403. All 3 pass.
README: Auth Code vs Client Credentials choice guide.

bonus.description: Multi-client config: NSE + BSE WebClients with @Qualifier. OrderExecutionService selects by exchange name.
TokenPropagationFilter: forwards incoming JWT to downstream risk-service. Test: SecurityContext JWT extracted correctly.
Token scope validation in @SpringBootTest: create Jwt.withTokenValue test object, verify hasScope() returns correct results.

ai_policy_explanation: 5 hints. SCOPE_ prefix: Spring Security automatically prefixes OAuth2 scopes with SCOPE_ when mapping to GrantedAuthority — use hasAuthority('SCOPE_payments:read') not hasRole. OAuth2AuthorizedClientManager: handles token lifecycle automatically — caches, checks expiry, requests new Client Credentials tokens without manual intervention. ServerOAuth2AuthorizedClientExchangeFilterFunction: reactive-compatible OAuth2 filter for WebClient (use this, not the Servlet version). setDefaultClientRegistrationId: ties all requests from a WebClient to one OAuth2 registration. JWT.withTokenValue() builder: for creating test Jwt objects without a real token issuer.
